Added_Graphics.name: FFlagEnablePeopleListLazyRender_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Loads the people list in parts instead of all at once.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Improves performance and reduces loading times for players.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagPeoplePagePostponeInitialRender_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Delays the loading of the people page to optimize performance.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Reduces initial loading times, making it faster for players to access their friends and community.

Added_Camera/UI.name: FFlagPeoplePageCardMenuUseVisibleProperty_Staged
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Changes how visibility settings are handled in player menus.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Improves user experience by making player interactions more intuitive and responsive.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows dynamic retrieval of version information from the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and updates, leading to a smoother experience for players.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Flips the timestamp in dynamic strings for better data handling.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players see the most current information in real-time updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for versioning.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows players to experience quicker updates and version checks.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling for timestamps in scripts.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and reduces lag when using timestamps in games.
